sentences.text: Hey, Austin, is it just me on here?
So I was in one meeting.
Are the group that needs to be on this.

So I'm worried that they may not make it right now.
Kind of going we had the.
I think we had that group the last time, and then you were out sick.
So I know it's just been kind of.
I mean, I'm not gonna buy a lottery ticket anytime soon.
I apologize to waste y'all's time.
But can can we reschedule, maybe, for next week, a day next week?
Let me get with the group and let the dust settle a little bit from

That they didn't show, and I hope you understand.

Yeah, definitely looking forward to catching up and showing what's new around here.
